heading: Lands and areas plan; submission to Congressional committees
label: 410eeee–3 Lands and areas plan; submission to Congressional committees
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 460m–17 of this title

Change of NameCommittee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives on , by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Third Congress.Jan. 5, 1993

children.label: i
children.text: the lands and areas which he deems essential to the protection and public enjoyment of the natural, scenic, and historic values and objects of this national river;

children.label: ii
children.text: the lands which he has previously acquired by purchase, donation, exchange, or transfer for the purpose of this national river;

children.label: iii
children.text: the annual acquisition program (including the level of funding) which he recommends for the ensuing four fiscal years; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the feasibility and suitability of including within the boundaries of the national river, the section of the New River from Fayetteville to Gauley Bridge, and reasons therefor.
